title: Sinthani mawu achinsinsi
subtitle: Sinthani chitetezo cha akaunti yanu
requirements: Iyenera kukhala ndi zilembo 8+, zilembo zazikulu, zilembo zazing'ono, nambala, & zilembo zapadera

messages.invalid: Mawu achinsinsi ayenera kukhala osachepera zilembo 8, zilembo zazikulu imodzi, zilembo zazing'ono, nambala imodzi ndi zilembo zapadera
